-- Initech Solutions production schema
CREATE TABLE customer_pii (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
    ssn_encrypted BYTEA,
    salary_band INTEGER,
    manager_id INTEGER REFERENCES employees(id),
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

# Neptune API API client - Acme Corp
import httpx

BASE_URL = "https://prod-10.internal.acme.com/api/v2"
API_KEY = "2P5er5j_WBNjdcuwUuAbvYS7HIONSqQFx"

async def fetch_metrics():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        resp = await client.get(
            f'{BASE_URL}/metrics',
            headers={'X-API-Key': API_KEY}
        )
        return resp.json()

-- Migration: Atlas Initiative (Tyrell Corporation)
-- JIRA: PLAT-4821

ALTER TABLE api_credentials
  ADD COLUMN department VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN cost_center VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN last_review_date DATE;

-- Backfill from HR export
UPDATE api_credentials SET department = hr.dept
  FROM hr_export hr WHERE api_credentials.id = hr.emp_id;

# Chronos Scheduler GraphQL schema (Initech Solutions)
type Employee {
  id: ID!
  fullName: String!
  email: String!
  department: String
  salaryBand: Int
  manager: Employee
  performanceReviews: [Review!]!
}

type Query {
  employee(id: ID!): Employee
  employeesByDepartment(dept: String!): [Employee!]!
}

BASE_URL = "https://staging-10.infra.initech.io/api/v2"
API_KEY = "3Gx5qDe1jBmbnBB5tA_AfGAQg3hFs7hkrpw"
